rationale: Educ. Code §21.4022(c)(3) merely requires disclosure of the local option homestead exemption at furlough meetings. It does not reference or depend on the mandatory exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: information regarding the local option residence homestead exemption.
_note: The rule references the local option exemption, not the mandatory §11.13(b) exemption being amended. No textual dependency or conflict identified.
